title: Temporal Resonance
description: The device activates. Reality trembles. Everything hangs in the balance.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Back at the Northern Sanctuary, a strange device hums to life. Gears spin faster. The air shimmers and bends.

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: Yes! YES! The temporal resonance is building! We will reshape history itself!

opening.speaker: Enforcer
opening.text: The failsafe. When I give the signal, activate it!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Something's wrong. The hum becomes a scream. Cultists look around in confusion and fear.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The device shudders and stops. Steam and glass fly everywhere. The device goes dark.

opening.speaker: Book Keeper
opening.text: Grandmaster! The readings! The temporal field has destabilized!

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: Impossible! The core has to stabilize...What did you do?!

opening.speaker: Book Keeper
opening.text: I did exactly what you asked!

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: No. NO! This was supposed to save us! To give me back what I have lost!

opening.speaker: Enforcer
opening.text: And yet, you let him go. You let them all go.

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: They will return. She will come to me.

opening.speaker: Enforcer
opening.text: How can you be so sure?

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: Because she knows now. but only part. And, it's what I would do.
